mapper.sql: id, register_id, patient_id, patient_name, physician_id, physician_name, medical_technology_id, medical_technology_name, clinical_diagnosis, specimen_type, status, check_time, report_time, result, ai_analysis, report_url, body_part, findings, conclusion, impression, remarks, operator_id, operator_name, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM check_request WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM check_request WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM check_request WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM check_request WHERE status IN (1, 2) ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE check_request SET clinical_diagnosis = #{clinicalDiagnosis}, specimen_type = #{specimenType}, status = #{status}, check_time = #{checkTime}, report_time = #{reportTime}, result = #{result}, ai_analysis = #{aiAnalysis}, report_url = #{reportUrl}, body_part = #{bodyPart}, findings = #{findings}, conclusion = #{conclusion}, impression = #{impression}, remarks = #{remarks}, operator_id = #{operatorId}, operator_name = #{operatorName} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE check_request SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE check_request SET result = #{result}, ai_analysis = #{aiAnalysis}, status = 3 WHERE id = #{id}
